title: Create: Armory
description:
Requires Create and GeckoLib

Create : Armory adds a wide range of guns that combine realistic and arcade combat elements to spice up your server or world.
body:
![image](https://www.dropbox.com/s/0bl5ol58zutvyhy/newlogo.png?dl=1)
Requires Create and GeckoLib

"7/10 for gun" - theomonty

Create : Armory adds a wide range of guns that combine realistic and arcade combat elements to spice up your server or world.

 

With Create : Armory, you can equip yourself with weapons such as a 50 caliber bullpup sniper, M4s, M16s, SMGs, a minigun, and even a rocket launcher. Each gun has its unique set of strengths and weaknesses, making it essential to choose the right weapon for each situation.

 

This mod also includes realistic ammo creation, which integrates with the Create mod. This means that you can craft your ammunition using realistic materials and processes.

 

Create : Armory is a great addition to any world or server whether you're fighting bosses or other players.

 

More pictures will be added soon but here is a guide:
https://youtu.be/SYC6pFQ78J8
